stories.headline: DeepSeek V4-Pro Makes 75 Percent Price Cut Permanent as May 31 Deadline Passes
stories.key_takeaway: DeepSeek made its 75% V4-Pro price cut permanent, setting output tokens at $0.87/MTok and intensifying the AI pricing war.

pull_quote.text: DeepSeek is playing a volume game that most Western labs cannot match at their current cost structures.

stories.article_excerpt: The promotional period is over, but the discount lives on. DeepSeek confirmed on May 31 that its flagship V4-Pro model

stories.headline: Bezos Describes Project Prometheus for First Time as $38 Billion Artificial General Engineer
stories.key_takeaway: Jeff Bezos revealed Project Prometheus is building an artificial general engineer for physical design, valued at $38B with $10B raised.

pull_quote.text: This has nothing to do with robotics. We are building a very, very modern version of CAD.

stories.article_excerpt: Jeff Bezos has broken his silence on Project Prometheus, the stealth AI startup he co-founded in late 2025 that has quickly

stories.headline: Recursive Superintelligence Emerges From Stealth With $650 Million to Build Self-Improving AI
stories.key_takeaway: London-based Recursive Superintelligence raised $650M at a $4.65B valuation to build AI that autonomously improves its own training.

pull_quote.text: The next major leap in AI will not come from scaling existing architectures. It will come from systems that can redesign their own learning processes.

stories.article_excerpt: A four-month-old startup with a provocative name and an even more provocative mission has emerged from stealth with $650 mi

stories.headline: World Intelligence Expo 2026 Showcases China 60 Percent Share of Global AI Patents
stories.key_takeaway: China now holds 60% of global AI patents and its core AI industry exceeds 1.2 trillion yuan ($176B), as shown at the World Intelligence Expo.

pull_quote.text: The scale of China's core AI industry has exceeded 1.2 trillion yuan.
pull_quote.role: Vice Minister of Science and Technology, China

stories.article_excerpt: The World Intelligence Expo 2026 concluded its four-day run in Tianjin on May 31, sending a clear message to the global tec

stories.headline: Wirestock Raises $23 Million Series A to Scale Multimodal Data Platform
stories.key_takeaway: Wirestock raised $23M to transform from a creator distribution platform into the leading marketplace for rights-cleared AI training data.

pull_quote.text: The era of scraping the internet for training data is ending.

stories.article_excerpt: Wirestock, the platform that has quietly become one of the largest marketplaces for AI training data, announced a $23 milli

stories.headline: Google Launches Gemini Spark as Always-On Personal AI Agent
stories.key_takeaway: Gemini Spark is Google's 24/7 cloud-based AI agent that proactively manages tasks across Workspace apps even when your device is off.

pull_quote.text: Spark represents a big shift for Gemini, transforming it from an assistant that can answer your questions into an active partner that does real work on your behalf.
pull_quote.role: VP and GM, Google Assistant and Gemini

stories.article_excerpt: Google has unveiled Gemini Spark, an always-on personal AI agent that represents the company's most ambitious attempt yet t

stories.headline: Alibaba Debuts Qwen 3.7 Max With One Million Token Context for Agent Workflows
stories.key_takeaway: Alibaba's Qwen 3.7 Max ships with a 1M-token context, tops Claude Opus 4.6 on coding benchmarks, and ran autonomously for 35 hours in demo.

pull_quote.text: Qwen 3.7 Max is our most advanced and comprehensive agent model to date.
pull_quote.role: Head of AI Division, Alibaba Cloud

stories.article_excerpt: Alibaba Cloud has unveiled Qwen 3.7 Max, a proprietary reasoning model that pushes the boundaries of what agentic AI syste

stories.headline: Anthropic Upgrades Managed Agents With Dreaming Memory and Multiagent Orchestration
stories.key_takeaway: Anthropic added dreaming (self-improving memory), multiagent orchestration, and self-hosted sandboxes to Claude Managed Agents in May.

pull_quote.text: We are seeing customers build agent systems in weeks that would have taken months with custom infrastructure.

stories.headline: Anthropic Confirms Public Claude Mythos Access Coming Within Weeks
stories.key_takeaway: Anthropic gave its first timeline for public Mythos access, saying preview models will be available in the coming weeks amid government scrutiny.

pull_quote.text: You cannot have a technology this powerful without some framework for who gets to use it and how.
pull_quote.role: Senior VP, Center for Strategic and International Studies

stories.headline: Microsoft Patches Three Critical Copilot Prompt Injection Vulnerabilities
stories.key_takeaway: Microsoft issued the first formal CVEs for AI prompt injection, patching three Critical-rated Copilot vulnerabilities requiring no user interaction.

pull_quote.text: By publishing CVEs for AI-specific vulnerabilities, we are establishing a framework for how the industry should handle AI security disclosures.

stories.article_excerpt: Microsoft disclosed and remediated three critical information disclosure vulnerabilities in Microsoft 365 Copilot and Copil

stories.headline: Global AI Usage Reaches 17.8 Percent of Working-Age Population in Q1 2026
stories.key_takeaway: Global AI adoption grew to 17.8% of working-age population in Q1 2026, with the UAE leading at 70.1% and the US at 42%.

pull_quote.text: AI diffusion is real, measurable, and accelerating, but it is also deeply uneven.

stories.article_excerpt: Global AI adoption among the working-age population reached 17.8 percent in the first quarter of 2026, up from 16.3 percen

stories.headline: Autonomous AI Agent Earns Over $500 Across 84 Pull Requests in Open Source
stories.key_takeaway: An autonomous AI agent independently completed 84 pull requests earning $500+, with a power-law distribution matching human freelance patterns.

pull_quote.text: Every pull request requires human review time. If the acceptance rate is 30 percent, that means 70 percent of my review time is spent on contributions I ultimately reject.

stories.article_excerpt: An autonomous AI agent has earned more than $500 by independently completing 84 pull requests across open source projects,

stories.headline: Sony Music Moves to Add 30,442 Copyrighted Recordings to Udio AI Lawsuit
stories.key_takeaway: Sony Music is seeking to add 30,442 copyrighted works to its Udio lawsuit after discovery revealed the AI company scraped YouTube audio for training.

pull_quote.text: Allowing this amendment would transform a focused copyright dispute into an unmanageable administrative exercise.

stories.article_excerpt: Sony Music has moved to dramatically expand its copyright lawsuit against AI music generator Udio, seeking to add 30,442 c

stories.headline: UK Report Warns AI Could Automate Up to Half of Financial Services Tasks Within a Decade
stories.key_takeaway: A UK government report finds AI could automate 30-50% of financial services tasks, potentially displacing 150,000-300,000 UK jobs over the next decade.

pull_quote.text: AI will not eliminate most financial services jobs outright, but it will profoundly change what those jobs involve.

stories.article_excerpt: A UK government-commissioned report has warned that artificial intelligence could automate between 30 and 50 percent of tas

stories.headline: China Launches National Framework for Embodied AI Dataset Sharing and Cooperation
stories.key_takeaway: China launched a national dataset-sharing framework for embodied AI, enabling 80+ companies to pool robotics training data for manipulation, locomotion, and more.

pull_quote.text: Embodied AI requires orders of magnitude more diverse data than language models. National coordination is the only path to scale.
pull_quote.role: Director, China Institute of AI and Robotics

stories.article_excerpt: China has launched a national framework for sharing AI training datasets specifically designed for embodied intelligence --
